---
title: "Initalizing_Landscape"
output: html_document
---
Bring in need packages
```{r}
library(terra)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
set.seed(123)

```

Pull in lanscape shp
```{r}
Landscape<- st_read("C:/Users/dinardo/LANDIS/NM_Masters_Thesis/NM_Conifer_Regen_Failure/StudyArea_shp/StudyArea.shp")
#look at it
plot(st_geometry(Landscape))
```
